title: Attack Overlay
description: Turns screen green when a player is in your crosshair to help with all aspects of pvp
body:
This mod Allows you to increase your sword pvp skill by rendering a green overlay whenever a player is in your crosshair, your attack cooldown is full and if you are holding a weapon. This is designed to improve timing and aim for all aspects of pvp but specifically sword (Click when the screen is green). Credit to dicedpixels on discord for helping me render a rectangle -_-. In Future I am adding:
- A way to toggle it.
- Support for newer versions.
